# Security Policy
We take the security of our web app and our users' data very seriously. To ensure that we maintain a high level of security, we have implemented the following security policy:

1. Data protection and privacy.
We will protect our users' personal data and privacy. We will use secure methods to collect, store, and process user data, and will comply with all applicable data protection laws.

2. Secure coding practices.
We will follow secure coding practices to minimize the risk of vulnerabilities in our web app. We will regularly review and update our code to address any security issues that are discovered.

3. Third-party dependencies.
We will only use third-party dependencies that are necessary and have been reviewed for security issues. We will regularly update our dependencies to address any security vulnerabilities.

4. Access control.
We will implement access control measures to ensure that only authorized users have access to our web app and our users' data.

5. Incident response.
In the event of a security incident, we will have a response plan in place to mitigate the impact of the incident and prevent it from happening again.

6. Testing and auditing.
We will regularly test and audit our web app to identify and address any security vulnerabilities. We will also conduct regular security assessments to ensure that our security measures are effective.

7. Communication and transparency.
We will communicate with our users about any security issues that arise and provide transparent information about how we are addressing those issues.

8. Compliance with regulations.
We will comply with all applicable laws and regulations related to data protection and privacy, including GDPR, CCPA, and other relevant regulations.

9. Training and awareness.
We will provide training and awareness programs for our team members to ensure that they are aware of our security policies and best practices, and to help them identify and respond to security threats.

10. Review and updates.
We will regularly review and update this security policy to ensure that it remains effective and up-to-date with current security best practices. We will notify our users and contributors of any updates to this policy.

11. Reporting security vulnerabilities.
We encourage anyone who discovers a security vulnerability in our web app to report it to us as soon as possible. Please email us at [admin@dijidaro.co.ke] with a detailed description of the vulnerability and any steps to reproduce it. We will investigate all reported vulnerabilities and take appropriate action to address them.
